# Requirement Template

Use in `docs/SRS/` volumes. Each requirement shall be atomic and testable.

---

## [REQ-ID]: [Short title]

| Attribute | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| **ID** | REQ-SYS-NNN / REQ-DCC-NNN / REQ-ECU-NNN |
| **Status** | Draft \| Proposed \| Approved \| Verified \| Deprecated |
| **Priority** | Critical \| High \| Medium \| Low |
| **Source** | WP-XXX / stakeholder / regulation |
| **Traceability** | ADR-NNN, `docs/NNN_*.md` |

### Statement

The [module] shall [measurable behavior].

### Rationale

Why this requirement exists.

### Acceptance criteria

| ID | Criterion | Verification method |
|----|-----------|---------------------|
| AC-1 | | Test / inspection / analysis |

### Dependencies

- Depends on: [REQ-IDs]
- Conflicts with: none \| [REQ-IDs]
